THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CONTINUED TO MAY 22, 2019 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES; EMAIL DATED MAY 9, 2019. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM) (302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JOHN ARNTZ AND DENNIS HERRERA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE." PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS EXTENDED AND NOW DUE BY JUNE 21, 2019. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2019 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael F. Denny (415-608-0269) Plaintiff in propria persona.
Tara M. Steeley, esq. (415-554-4655) Deputy City Attorney for Defendants.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs JOHN ARNTZ and DENNIS HERRERA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:

Defendants John Arntz and Dennis J. Herrera's demurrer to Contestants Michael Denny and Nicholas Smith's complaint is sustained as to all five causes of action without leave to amend. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Defendants John Arntz And Dennis Herrera'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michale Denny, Telephone 415-608-0269, & Nicholas Smith, Telephone 415-608-0269, appearing on thier own behalfs as pro per plaintiffs for Plaintiff
No other appearance.

Plaintffs did not correctly contest this motion. Defendant's were not properly noticed of plaintiff(s) appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants John Arntz And Dennis Herrera'S Demurrer To Complaint

Defendants' demurrer to the complaint is ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with CCP 430.41, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone." Plaintiff is ordered to comply with 430.41. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. Defendant's response to the complaint is extended and now due by June 21, 2019. Defendant's counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order that complies with CRC 3.1312.
